def negative_python_perf_layer_memory_allocation_deepcopy_before_readonly_transform():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_memory_allocation_deepcopy_before_readonly_transform"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Layer: Memory allocation. Flag copy.deepcopy of large objects before operations that only read them."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
